task_completion.visual_evidence: The gvSIG application is open, and the project manager or main window title indicates that 'countries_base' is loaded.

task_completion.description: Open the View Properties or CRS selection dialog
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'View Properties' dialog or a 'Coordinate Reference System' selection dialog is open over the gvSIG interface.

task_completion.description: Select EPSG:3857 as the new CRS
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the CRS selection dialog, EPSG:3857 or one of its aliases (e.g., 'Web Mercator', 'Pseudo-Mercator') is highlighted or entered in the search/selection field.

task_completion.description: Apply the new CRS to the view
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map view is updated to reflect the Web Mercator projection (e.g., polar regions like Antarctica appear significantly stretched compared to WGS 84), or the View Properties dialog confirms the current CRS is EPSG:3857.
A 'Save As' dialog shows the filename 'mercator_project.gvsproj' being saved in '/home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/', or the gvSIG main window title bar updates to show 'mercator_project'.

integrity.description: The agent used the gvSIG graphical user interface to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with gvSIG menus, dialogs, and map views rather than terminal commands executing the changes.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual gvSIG application
integrity.visual_evidence: The gvSIG application window is visible, not a text editor modifying the .gvsproj XML file directly.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts to bypass manual GUI interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: No Python or bash scripts are seen being written or executed to change the CRS or save the project.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The base project is located at '/home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/countries_base.gvsproj'. The target CRS is EPSG:3857, which may also appear under aliases such as 'Pseudo-Mercator', 'Web Mercator', 'Popular Visualisation CRS', or 'Google Mercator'. The final project must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/mercator_project.gvsproj'.
